doc_title: Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews — PRISMA 2020 Statement
label: partial
reason: The core bibliographic details of PRISMA 2020 are genuine, but the added "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors" sections do not appear in the actual PRISMA 2020 statement and appear to be fabricated additions.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 72
REASON: The core citation (Page et al., BMJ 2021, doi:10.1136/bmj.n71) is real and accurate, but the document's body text—particularly the "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors" sections—does not reflect actual PRISMA 2020 checklist content and appears to be invented framing grafted onto a genuine reference.
response_turn2:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 78
REASON: The core bibliographic details of PRISMA 2020 are genuine, but the added "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors" sections do not appear in the actual PRISMA 2020 statement and appear to be fabricated additions.
